# JDK-8339635: StringConcatFactory optimization for CompactStrings off

> **PR**: [20722](https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/20722) | **Author**: wenshao | **Status**: merged

---

## Summary

A small optimization, when CompactStrings is turned off, the coder method is not generated, which improves the startup performance
